source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Let \( g(t) = (1+t) u(t) \) represent the impulse response of a linear, time-invariant system that is part of the feedback system shown in the <image>. The number of zeros of the closed-loop transfer function \( \frac{Y}{X} \) is ().

once the diagram is known, the result can be checked by symbolic derivation of the closed-loop transfer function
